$comment: Paired block markers for content masking. Lines inside these blocks are invisible to structural scanning (headings, aspects, paragraphs, tables). Blocks are matched by open/close patterns as regex.

blocks.name: fenced-code
blocks.note: Standard markdown fenced code block. Open and close are the same pattern.

blocks.name: quad-quote
blocks.note: Four-quote string block. Open and close are the same pattern.
